title: crataegus pentagyna var. oliveriana
intro: Crataegus pentagyna var. oliveriana, also known as Oliver's hawthorn or May hawthorn, is a variety of the Crataegus pentagyna species, belonging to the Rosaceae family of plants. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that have been traditionally used to support heart health. The health benefits of Crataegus pentagyna var. oliveriana include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular function, and providing antioxidant properties that can help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and can be used to support heart health and overall well-being.
